svg.title: Compound workspace patterns — how N engines arrange on screen
svg.desc: Six pre-built multi-engine workspace layouts showing how panels dock and float
svg.text: click any workspace to explore how its engines connect

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the full sales workspace setup with CRM, email, and calendar engines connected.')
sendPrompt('Show me the dev workspace with code IDE, terminal, issues, and git connected.')
sendPrompt('Show me the content workspace with document, research, and calendar connected.')
sendPrompt('Show me the finance workspace with sheet, dashboard, and invoice connected.')
sendPrompt('Show me the customer success workspace with CRM, support tickets, and health scores.')
sendPrompt('How does focus mode work — one engine fullscreen, others suspended?')

svg.text: How engines react when you select "Acme Corp" in CRM

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What data does CRM emit when a company is selected?')

svg.text: Layout engine sees "record.selected company" → slides email + calendar panels into view
CRM panel stays center · side panels resize automatically · no user action needed
